title: botryphile botryoides
side_effects: Botryphile botryoides can have side effects if used improperly, such as skin irritation, allergic reactions, and respiratory issues. Ingesting the plant's extract can lead to stomach upset, nausea, and diarrhea, while excessive use can cause liver damage and kidney failure. Some users may experience headaches, dizziness, and fatigue when using the plant's essential oil without proper dilution. Additionally, improper use of the plant can exacerbate pre-existing medical conditions, such as epilepsy or high blood pressure.
